creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
The only thing I can really suggest is checking CUPS while it is in debug mode 
and seeing why it is throwing a fit. I know for myself, I was unable to print 
after the 1.7.1 upgrade until I installed cups-filters and also fixed my 
ghostscript to have pswrite, which I didn't have enabled before. I think this is 
one of those YMMV moments. Not much I can really do about that.

On 04/11/14 15:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of print/cups-filters,
>
> Please note that PR ports/188470 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/188470
>
